block.excitingenchants.pitfall_trap.lore: Can be placed on shovel blocks and activates after 15 seconds.
item.excitingenchants.hot_dog.tooltip: Put some Blaze Powder on it and you can't tell the difference.
item.excitingenchants.soggy_note.lore_1: If you find this, you lost.
item.excitingenchants.soggy_note.lore_3: Kiss me and i'll turn into a frog.
item.excitingenchants.soggy_note.lore_6: You want my treasure?  You can have it!
item.excitingenchants.soggy_note.lore_7: Help, i'm stuck at the bottom of the water.
enchantment.excitingenchants.earthen_spi: On right-click, summons a spike from the ground that causes spiked effect.
enchantment.excitingenchants.splatter.de: Shoots projectiles out of targets you hit.
enchantment.excitingenchants.hungry.desc: Automatically eats food for you. Slightly less efficient than eating yourself
enchantment.excitingenchants.diviner.des: Lets you sense aggressive mobs around you.
enchantment.excitingenchants.squid_encou: Sprays ink on attackers when hit.
enchantment.excitingenchants.bulwark.des: Reduces knockback taken but slows movement.
enchantment.excitingenchants.run_away.de: Increases movement speed at low health.
Increases attack damage at low health.
enchantment.excitingenchants.evoking.des: Summons evoker fangs when you are hit.
enchantment.excitingenchants.dash.desc: Allows you to dash forward by sneaking mid-air.
enchantment.excitingenchants.ender_pocke: Grants access to part of your Ender Chest.
enchantment.excitingenchants.charge.desc: Increases damage while sprinting toward your target.
enchantment.excitingenchants.collecting_: Gives a chance to collect incoming projectiles.
enchantment.excitingenchants.buoyant.des: Lets you walk on lava not sneaking.
Allows you to jump again while mid-air.
enchantment.excitingenchants.reverberati: Breaks nearby blocks of the same type.
enchantment.excitingenchants.soul_rend.d: Greatly reduces damage but ignores armor.
enchantment.excitingenchants.sneak_attac: Greatly increases damage if both you and your target are at full health.
enchantment.excitingenchants.frenzy.desc: Deals extra damage when attacking the same target repeatedly.
enchantment.excitingenchants.reaping.des: Steals potion effects from the target.
enchantment.excitingenchants.pocket_sand: Lets you place sand by right-clicking.
enchantment.excitingenchants.trap_digger: Lets you place hidden traps by right-clicking.
enchantment.excitingenchants.pickerang.d: Allows you to throw your pickaxe to mine and attack at a distance.
enchantment.excitingenchants.dequiping.d: Deals very little damage but may remove worn armor.
enchantment.excitingenchants.gravity_imp: Pulls nearby mobs toward you on a smash attack.
enchantment.excitingenchants.sunray.desc: Summons a beam of light when arrows hit a block.
enchantment.excitingenchants.pinning.des: Pins the target to the ground.
enchantment.excitingenchants.trailing.de: Leaves a trail behind flying tipped arrows.
enchantment.excitingenchants.volley.desc: Arrows split into multiple falling arrows when shot upward.
enchantment.excitingenchants.living_wood: Shoots weaker wooden arrows when no arrows are available. Ignores other Enchantments.
enchantment.excitingenchants.bullet_time: You get balloons that grant slow falling
enchantment.excitingenchants.echoing.des: Loads echo shards to fire a warden-like sonic attack.
enchantment.excitingenchants.sharing.des: Gives one of your potion effects to the target.
enchantment.excitingenchants.galvanizing: Loads lightning rods to fire chain lightning.
Loads cobblestone to fire a spread of small projectiles.
enchantment.excitingenchants.yoinking.de: May steal items from hooked creatures' hands.
enchantment.excitingenchants.flash_freez: Places powdered snow when hitting a block or entity.
enchantment.excitingenchants.barbed_hook: Pins mobs that walk over the bobber.
enchantment.excitingenchants.poseidon.de: Places water wherever the trident lands.
enchantment.excitingenchants.devils_tool: Makes your trident fire-based instead of water-based.
enchantment.excitingenchants.bouncy.desc: Blocking prevents damage but not knockback.
enchantment.excitingenchants.devouring.d: Blocking attacks drains the attacker's hunger.
Teleports you randomly when the shield breaks.
enchantment.excitingenchants.immortality: The shield acts like a totem of undying.
enchantment.excitingenchants.pheromone_s: Applies aggression pheromones to hit targets.
enchantment.excitingenchants.sanguine.de: Let's you use your hearts as a Projectile.
enchantment.excitingenchants.spiked_stin: Gives hit entities the hallucination Effect.
enchantment.excitingenchants.rubber_band: Randomly teleport you upwards while falling.
enchantment.excitingenchants.bad_bait.de: Makes you unable to catch fish.
enchantment.excitingenchants.black_thumb: Makes plants around you wither away.
enchantment.excitingenchants.chorus.desc: Makes the item randomly teleport around.
enchantment.excitingenchants.ghouls.desc: Makes you unable to eat most foods.
enchantment.excitingenchants.midas.desc: Turns everything you touch into gold.
enchantment.excitingenchants.needed_stab: Makes the block sometimes place itself.
enchantment.excitingenchants.nerf.desc: Turns arrows into harmless foam darts.
effect.excitingenchants.pinned.descripti: Makes you unable to move. Can be removed by sneaking. On higher levels, deals damage when removing.
effect.excitingenchants.inked.descriptio: Covered in ink, you get slower and your vision gets obstructed.
effect.excitingenchants.castle_mode.desc: Makes you unable to move but increases armor and knockback resistance.
effect.excitingenchants.meat_crazed.desc: Makes you unable to eat anything but meat.
